title: hieracium adenobrachion
intro: Hieracium adenobrachion, also known as Hawkweed, is a flowering plant belonging to the dandelion-like plants in the sunflower family (Asteraceae). The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its leaves and flowers, which contain sesquiterpene lactones that have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Hieracium adenobrachion include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. The herbal preparations of this plant typically involve infusions or decoctions of the leaves and flowers, which can be consumed as teas or added to salads for their nutritional value.
